description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk:10-jdk Docker image and a GRADLE_OPTS variable set to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Add a before_script that runs chmod +x gradlew. Define three stages: build, test, deploy. In the build stage add a build job that caches the build and .gradle directories with a push policy keyed by $CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME, then executes ./gradlew --build-cache assemble. In the test stage add a test job that pulls the same cache and runs ./gradlew check. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that pulls the cache and runs ./gradlew dockerPush to publish the Docker image. No additional rules or artifacts are defined.
